introductions: old grief leaks into ordinary routine
the room carries yesterday's unspoken accusation
private tenderness starts looking like evidence
developments: small gestures and withheld answers narrow the emotional field
institutional language keeps bruising the private conversation
every response makes repair more costly
conflicts: love and honesty demand incompatible timings
dignity and disclosure start opposing each other
everyone wants repair, but not the same version of truth

resolutions.final: the scene ends after someone chooses painful honesty over emotional convenience
resolutions.default: the scene closes with partial knowledge, altered leverage, and rising risk

exits.final: the chapter hands off to a sharper consequence that cannot be re-contained
exits.default: the next scene begins before the pressure can settle

stateChanges.final: the chapter-level wound becomes public and emotionally irreversible
stateChanges.default: the local conflict changes direction, but the central pressure remains active
